title: Socratic phase-2 evidence
description: Evidence produced by the socratic phase-2 agent: a manifest of the synthesized docs (PRD, use-cases, ADRs, arc42), plus the run id whose `mm-tree-socratic` artifact holds the socratic leg's final tree (the one the combine hook pushes).

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id of the phase-2 run; the combine hook downloads its `mm-tree-socratic` artifact.

files.description: Manifest of synthesized docs (paths relative to the tree root).
